mnemonics: HI-LO: Horizontal (Human-AI interaction) & Vertical (Levels of Automation) are the two key dimensions.
keyPoints: The framework consists of a Horizontal Dimension, which focuses on the nature of Human-AI interaction and collaboration.
The framework consists of a Vertical Dimension, which focuses on the Levels of Automation, from fully manual to fully autonomous systems.
The goal is to find the optimal balance on both dimensions for a given task and context, maximizing human and AI strengths.
commonMistakes: Assuming the goal is always full automation (High on Vertical axis); often a balanced partnership is better.
Treating the two dimensions as independent; changes in automation level directly impact the required interaction design.
